response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed Minecraft gameplay, trading, and farm management. 2. Listened to the entire audio track to detect any vocal music. 3. Confirmed that only the streamer's voice, game sound effects, and instrumental background music are present. No vocal music was detected. 4. Since no songs were detected, no lyrics search was performed.
response.global_summary: A video of a Minecraft stream featuring the player trading items, visiting an ATM, buying stocks, and managing a chicken farm. The background audio consists only of the streamer's voice, game sound effects, and instrumental music. There is no vocal music present throughout the video.

scenes.description: The streamer is interacting with the Sell tab in a market, selling items to other players.
The streamer walks to an ATM and withdraws money.
The streamer visits the Securities Exchange ('証券取引所') and buys various stocks.
The streamer leaves the market and travels to a farm area.
The streamer enters the farm building and interacts with chickens.
